title: narcissus gayi
intro: Narcissus gayi, a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, is commonly known as the gayi daffodil or Himalayan daffodil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Narcissus gayi include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
